title: WELL Four-Mirror State Schema — Vitality Peace Score
description: Multi-dimensional readiness index for consequential action. VPS = decision-readiness, not wellness oracle. Weakest substrate gates all decisions.

vitality_peace_score.description: How safe and ready the whole human-machine system is for consequential action right now. NOT health, happiness, productivity, obedience, or moral worth.
vitality_peace_score.note: Weights must be personal and adaptive. Until real human evidence exists, H must be marked UNKNOWN, not inferred from machine behaviour.
vitality_peace_score.override_rule: Weakest critical dimension overrides the weighted average. A score of 80 must not hide a security score of 18. The overall verdict must still be HOLD.

KUKUH.meaning: Suitable for normal and consequential work

STRAINED.meaning: Reduce mutation; favour review and consolidation

DEGRADED.meaning: No irreversible decisions; enter cooling mode

CRITICAL.meaning: Stop high-risk execution and prioritise human recovery or machine repair

UNKNOWN.meaning: Evidence is insufficient; do not manufacture a score

H_WELL.description: Human recovery — sleep, HRV, movement, self-reported energy, pain, stress. Baseline-relative. Non-medical.

CRITICAL.requires: sovereign self-report critical OR medical signal

UNKNOWN.requires: no data >48h OR inject refused OR no self-report

H_WELL.hard_rule: H = UNKNOWN until real human evidence exists. No inference from machine load, interaction patterns, or language behaviour.

M_WELL.description: Machine stability — VPS health, tool reliability, latency, failed jobs, security state.

STABLE.requires: CPU <70%, memory <80%, disk <80%, no container crashes, tool latency <2s

STRAINED.requires: 1 metric above threshold OR tool latency >2s OR 1 failed job

DEGRADED.requires: 2+ metrics degraded OR container restarts >3/h OR multiple tool failures

CRITICAL.requires: disk >95% OR memory >95% OR multiple organs down OR security breach

G_WELL.description: Governance integrity — evidence quality, contradiction rate, drift, authority clarity, constitutional compliance.

COHERENT.requires: all floors pass, no contradictions, evidence tagged, seal chain intact

UNCERTAIN.requires: 1+ unresolved contradiction OR missing evidence OR vague triggers

DRIFTING.requires: identity drift detected OR seal chain gap OR git SHA mismatch

COMPROMISED.requires: F1-F13 violation OR fabrication detected OR authority confusion

C_WELL.description: Coupling safety — whether current human and machine conditions amplify one another dangerously.

HIGH_RISK.requires: H=CRITICAL OR M=CRITICAL OR G=COMPROMISED OR 2+ degraded

HOLD.requires: sovereign ack OR all substrates recovered

gate_rule.description: Weakest substrate determines the response. The score is a decision-readiness index with visible causes, not a wellness oracle.
gate_rule.override_rule: Weakest critical dimension overrides the weighted average. A VPS of 80 with Security=18 must verdict HOLD.

REDUCE_LOAD.blocked: C4 irreversible, new dependencies, prod deploy

RECOVER.blocked: all mutations, all seals, all deploys

INSUFFICIENT_DATA.action: request sovereign inject or wait for sensor

morning_brief_format.description: The morning brief must never show only one number. It must show decomposition with visible causes.

human.note: No biometric data or self-report in 48h

governance.note: Identity drift detected, git SHA mismatch

example.primary_cause: Governance strain, not confirmed biological strain
example.recommended_posture: Consolidation only. No deploy, publish, delete or seal.

constitutional_hard_rules.description: Non-negotiable constraints on VPS computation and use.

rules.rule: No biometric inference from VPS data alone
Human self-report can override weak behavioural inference
A low score must reduce machine authority, not human dignity
rules.enforcement: tool_routing gates machine, not human choices

rules.rule: The agent may pause dangerous tools, but must not control ordinary human choices
Raw biometric data should remain local; WELL receives derived states where possible
The weakest critical dimension overrides the average

receipt_policy.H_WELL_receipts: expire after 24h unless explicitly pinned by sovereign
receipt_policy.C_WELL_receipts: store episodes only, not continuous traces
receipt_policy.G_WELL_receipts: every time human-origin evidence gates machine action
receipt_policy.raw_biometrics: never leave local disk; agent receives derived states only

peace_condition.description: Peace = recoverable homeostasis with preserved sovereignty
peace_condition.formula: H.recovery_capacity AND (M.stable OR M.safely_degraded) AND G.coherent AND C.low_escalation
peace_condition.not: permanent calm, obedient behavior, optimized predictability, absence of unpredictability
